User.title: User
User.description: A user profile in the app.

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

createdAt.description: When the user profile was created.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: An image post created by a user.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who created the post.

authorName.description: The display name of the author.

authorPhoto.description: The profile picture URL of the author.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the posted image.

likesCount.description: The number of likes the post has received.

Like.title: Like
Like.description: A record of a user liking a post.

postId.description: The ID of the liked post.

userId.description: The ID of the user who liked the post.

Follow.title: Follow
Follow.description: A record of a user following another user.

followerId.description: The ID of the user who is following.

followingId.description: The ID of the user being followed.

postId.description: The ID of the post being commented on.

authorId.description: The ID of the user who wrote the comment.

authorName.description: The display name of the author.

authorPhoto.description: The profile picture URL of the author.

text.description: The text content of the comment.

userId.description: The ID of the user receiving the notification.

type.description: The type of notification (like, comment, follow, message).

senderId.description: The ID of the user who triggered the notification.

senderName.description: The name of the user who triggered the notification.

senderPhoto.description: The photo URL of the user who triggered the notification.

postId.description: The ID of the related post, if any.

read.description: Whether the notification has been read.

SavedPost.title: SavedPost
SavedPost.description: A record of a user saving a post.

userId.description: The ID of the user who saved the post.

postId.description: The ID of the saved post.

Story.title: Story
Story.description: A temporary photo or video story.

authorId.description: The ID of the user who created the story.

authorPhoto.description: The photo URL of the author.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the story image.

expiresAt.description: When the story expires (24h after creation).

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: A direct messaging chat between users.

participants.description: The IDs of the users in the chat.

lastMessage.description: The text of the last message sent.

lastMessageTime.description: When the last message was sent.

updatedAt.description: When the chat was last updated.

chatId.description: The ID of the chat this message belongs to.

senderId.description: The ID of the user who sent the message.

text.description: The text content of the message.

/likes/{likeId}.description: Stores like records to prevent duplicate likes.
